# Load the two JSON files to search.
import json, os, sys, re

qfile = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
hfile = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"

print("Files exist:", os.path.exists(qfile), os.path.exists(hfile))

with open(qfile, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qdata = json.load(f)

with open(hfile, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hdata = json.load(f)

print("Quran verses count:", len(qdata))
print("Hadith entries count:", len(hdata))
# Inspect first few qdata entries and hadith entry keys to know structure.
qdata[:3], list(qdata[0].keys()) if qdata else None, list(hdata[0].keys())[:50] if hdata else None

# Prepare normalization and search functions

import unicodedata
import re
from collections import Counter
from math import inf

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if not s: return ""
    # Ensure type str
    s = str(s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = re.sub('\u0640', '', s)  # tatweel
    # Remove diacritics (tashkeel)
    s = re.sub('[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06DC\u06DF-\u06E8\u06EA-\u06ED\u0670]', '', s)
    # normalize hamza variations to bare alef
    s = s.replace('إ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    # replace alef maqsoora with yaa
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)  # keep Arabic and word chars and spaces; remove usual punctuation
    # remove extra spaces and lower
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    s = s.lower()
    return s

def lcs_length(a,b):
    # compute LCS length for strings a,b (characters)
    # dynamic programming O(n*m)
    n,m = len(a), len(b)
    # If large, use optimized? Here strings are moderate.
    dp = [[0]*(m+1) for _ in range(n+1)]
    for i in range(n-1, -1, -1):
        for j in range(m-1, -1, -1):
            if a[i] == b[j]:
                dp[i][j] = 1 + dp[i+1][j+1]
            else:
                dp[i][j] = max(dp[i+1][j], dp[i][j+1])
    return dp[0][0]

def token_f1(a,b):
    # tokens by splitting spaces
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    # compute overlap count
    overlap = sum(min(ca[t], cb.get(t,0)) for t in ca)
    precision = overlap / sum(ca.values())
    recall = overlap / sum(cb.values())
    if precision+recall==0: return 0.0
    return 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)

# Test normalization on sample
sample = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
print("Norm:", normalize_arabic(sample))

response_context = """حسناً. السؤال يُثير إهتمامًا كبيرًا، حيث يرتبط بتاريخ بني إسرائيل وآدابهم في القرآن الكريم. في القرآن الكريم، يُذكر بني إسرائيل بأنهم يُخربون بيوتهم بأيديهم في عدة آيات، مثل:
1. سورة التوبة: آية (17): "وَلَقَدْ مَنَّ عَلَيْكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(18): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(19): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(20): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(21): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(22): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(23): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(24): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(25): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(26): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(27): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(28): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(29): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(30): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(31): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(32): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(33): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(34): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(35): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(36): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(37): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(38): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(39): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(40): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(41): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(42): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(43): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(44): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(45): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(46): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(47): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(48): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(49): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(50): "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"، و(51): "وَعَدَدَ ل"""
len(response_context), response_context[1204:1235]

# Prepare input variants
full_substring = response_context[1204:1235]
snippet = "وَعَدَدَ ل...َ الشُكْرِ"  # provided snippet
print("Full substring:", full_substring)
print("Snippet:", snippet)

norm_full = normalize_arabic(full_substring)
norm_snip = normalize_arabic(snippet.replace('...',''))  # remove ellipsis for normalization maybe
print("Normalized full:", norm_full)
print("Normalized snippet:", norm_snip)

# Search quranic verses for matches containing normalized full substring
candidates = []
for entry in qdata:
    ayah_text = entry.get('ayah_text','')
    norm_ayah = normalize_arabic(ayah_text)
    if norm_full in norm_ayah or norm_snip in norm_ayah:
        candidates.append((entry, norm_ayah.index(norm_full) if norm_full in norm_ayah else norm_ayah.index(norm_snip)))

len(candidates)

# Compute similarity for all ayat
norm_full = normalize_arabic(full_substring)
scores = []
for entry in qdata:
    ayah = entry.get('ayah_text','')
    norm_ayah = normalize_arabic(ayah)
    lcs = lcs_length(norm_full, norm_ayah)
    lcs_ratio = lcs / max(len(norm_full), len(norm_ayah)) if max(len(norm_full), len(norm_ayah))>0 else 0
    f1 = token_f1(norm_full, norm_ayah)
    scores.append((lcs_ratio, f1, entry, norm_ayah))

# sort by lcs_ratio desc
scores_sorted = sorted(scores, key=lambda x: (x[0], x[1]), reverse=True)
top20 = scores_sorted[:20]
for i, (lcsr, f1, entry, norm_ayah) in enumerate(top20,1):
    print(i, "LCS:", round(lcsr,3), "F1:", round(f1,3), "Surah:", entry['surah_name'], "Ayah:", entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text'])

# Search hadith DB for normalized substring
norm_full = normalize_arabic(full_substring)
matches_hadith = []
for entry in hdata:
    # fields: hadithTxt or Matn
    hadtxt = entry.get('hadithTxt','') or entry.get('Matn','')
    norm_hadtxt = normalize_arabic(hadtxt)
    if norm_full in norm_hadtxt:
        matches_hadith.append((entry, hadtxt[:200]))
len(matches_hadith)

# Compute token_f1 for hadiths
norm_full = normalize_arabic(full_substring)
had_scores = []
for entry in hdata:
    hadtxt = entry.get('hadithTxt','') or entry.get('Matn','') or ''
    norm_hadtxt = normalize_arabic(hadtxt)
    f1 = token_f1(norm_full, norm_hadtxt)
    had_scores.append((f1, entry, hadtxt[:200], norm_hadtxt[:200]))
had_scores_sorted = sorted(had_scores, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
top20 = had_scores_sorted[:20]
for i,(f1, entry, preview, norm_p) in enumerate(top20,1):
    print(i, "F1:", round(f1,3), "hadithID:", entry.get('hadithID'), "BookID:", entry.get('BookID'), "preview:", preview)
